personality: 6 Glass / Luxe structure with 7 Dark-First Utility color/typography
personality_one_liner: A premium, glassmorphic neural interface that feels tangibly futuristic, combining cinematic depth with high-contrast cyberpunk utility.

spacing.rule: Use an 8px base grid. 8-12px for tight grouping, 24px+ for margins and card padding. Ensure 44x44pt touch targets with proper inactive space.

do's: Use backdrop-filter blur on the Notification Shade, Lock Screen overlay, Widgets, and Dock.
Apply a 5-10% neon tint overlay to glass panels to reflect the ambient environment.
Use 1px semi-transparent neon borders (borderStrong/border) to create a frosted, luminous edge.
Stack translucent layers to build cinematic depth (foreground neon UI, midground glass panels, background dark wallpaper).
dont's: Do not use pure white or gray for glass; always use dark, neon-tinted translucency.
Do not apply glass behind dense body text or settings toggles.
Do not use generic drop shadows; use neon glow shadows (same color as element + blur/spread) for active/illuminated states.

screens.name: LockScreen
screens.purpose: AOD / Lock Screen simulator with ambient particle wallpaper, large clock, and fake unlocking interaction.
screens.layout: Full-bleed ambient wallpaper. Oversized display clock at the top third using displayFontFamily (Rajdhani). Subtle 'swipe to unlock' glow chevron at the bottom. Lock icon and quick shortcuts (camera/flashlight) in bottom corners. Background is slightly dimmed until interaction.

screens.name: InfiniteLauncher
screens.purpose: Endless scrolling fake desktop (horizontal/vertical) with grid layout of icons, folders, and widgets.
screens.layout: Edge-to-edge transparent background. 4x6 grid of app icons (rounded squares with inner gradients and thin neon borders). A fixed frosted-glass Dock at the bottom. Floating page indicators above the dock. Fake AdMob banner sticky at the bottom edge. Widgets placed randomly on the grid occupying 2x2 or 4x2 spaces.

screens.name: NotificationShade
screens.purpose: Pull-down glass panel generating endless fake system notifications with swipe-to-dismiss.

states.empty: Glass panel reading 'System Optimized. All clear.'

screens.layout: Full-screen translucent glassmorphic overlay dragging down from the top. Top header contains quick-settings circles (WiFi, Bluetooth, Battery). Below is a scrolling list of notification cards (surfaceSecondary with border styling). Swiping a card triggers a particle explosion. Date and large clock embedded at the top.

screens.name: FocusMode
screens.purpose: Interactive particle playground activated by double-tap.
screens.layout: Pure AMOLED black background (#000000). All UI vanishes. Interactive canvas capturing gestures to drive react-native-skia fluid particles, energy waves, and constellation dots. Follows multi-touch. Hidden 'exit' button (double-tap again to close).

screens.name: SkinStoreAndSettings
screens.purpose: Rewarded ad store to unlock themes and sliders for haptic/particle tuning.
screens.layout: Scrollable list of Premium Skins displayed as large glass cards showing a preview image, skin name, and an 'Unlock / Active' pill button. Below skins, a 'Settings' section with branded sliders (haptic intensity, particle density) and segmented controls for particle style.

instructions_to_main_agent: Premium Skin Palettes (Implement via dynamic theme context):

Widget Specs: Use a 4x2 grid block for the main Clock/Weather widget. Design it with heavy glass blur, a prominent Rajdhani time display, and a neon-glowing outline. Music widget (2x2) with concentric circular visualizers.
Icon Strategy: Create ~20 generic premium icons (e.g., mail, camera, settings, secure vault, terminal, scanner). Use a dark surface tertiary base with neon gradients for the glyphs.

Notification Shade: Must use 'expo-blur' (intensity ~70) with a 5% brand overlay color. Ensure swiping to dismiss triggers a react-native-reanimated layout transition AND a small burst of particles (via skia/lottie) with haptic success.
Focus Mode: This is the core 'fidget' mechanic. Ensure react-native-skia particle rendering operates at 120fps. Double-tap to enter/exit. Use pan gesture handlers to trail particles on drag.
Glow Effects: Use 'box-shadow' with large blur radius and the brand color at ~30% opacity on active elements, replacing standard material drop shadows.
Animations: Use Reanimated with quick springs (damping 15, stiffness 150) for widget bounces and Notification shade pull.
Include the fake AdMob banner space smoothly into the layout so it doesn't break the infinite scrolling mechanics.
